positive: A geometric, minimalist composition featuring a stylized celestial map. The main subject is a cluster of interconnected stars and constellations, rendered in fine, glowing white lines against a deep indigo midnight blue background. Incorporate abstract, geometric elements like intersecting arcs and stylized zodiac symbols (e.g., moon phases, comet tails) that feel both cosmic and architectural. The style should be neo-art nouveau mixed with modern sci-fi etching, utilizing strong contrast and clean silhouettes. The print should be highly scalable, making the central motifs legible and impactful when printed on a shirt. The overall composition should be symmetrical and centered, ensuring the main celestial pattern is the focal point. Detailed, high contrast, vector graphic quality.
